name: io.github.dillan/kip-mcp-server
title: KIP MCP Server
description: Reads a boat's Signal K data and helps an AI assistant design and install KIP dashboards.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNALK_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Signal K server host name or IP.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNALK_TLS
environmentVariables.description: Set true if Signal K uses https/wss.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNALK_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Signal K token, needed to write dashboards (or use SIGNALK_USER/PASSWORD).

environmentVariables.name: SIGNALK_USER
environmentVariables.description: Signal K username, used with SIGNALK_PASSWORD instead of a token.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNALK_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Signal K password, used with SIGNALK_USER.

environmentVariables.name: KIP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override where KIP is served, if it is not the default.
